name: Work Item Seed Main
description: Rich main form for the Dataverse metadata synthesis seed.
formxml:
<form headerdensity="HighWithControls">
      <tabs>
        <tab name="summary" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111}" IsUserDefined="1" expanded="true" showlabel="true">
          <labels>
            <label description="Summary" languagecode="1033" />
          </labels>
          <columns>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="overview" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111112}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Overview" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111113}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Work Item" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_workitemname" datafieldname="cdxmeta_workitemname" classid="{4273EDBD-AC1D-40d3-9FB2-095C621B552D}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111114}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Summary" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_summary" datafieldname="cdxmeta_summary" classid="{4273EDBD-AC1D-40d3-9FB2-095C621B552D}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111115}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Category" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_categoryid" datafieldname="cdxmeta_categoryid" classid="{270BD3DB-D9AF-4782-9025-509E298DEC0A}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="details" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111116}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Details" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111117}" showlabel="true" rowspan="4">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Notes" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_details" datafieldname="cdxmeta_details" classid="{E0DECE4B-6FC8-4a8f-A065-082708572369}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
          </columns>
        </tab>
        <tab name="planning" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111118}" IsUserDefined="1" expanded="true" showlabel="true">
          <labels>
            <label description="Planning" languagecode="1033" />
          </labels>
          <columns>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="schedule" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111119}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Schedule" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111120}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Due date" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_duedate" datafieldname="cdxmeta_duedate" classid="{5B773807-9FB2-42db-97C3-7A91EFF8ADFF}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111121}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Effort hours" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_efforthours" datafieldname="cdxmeta_efforthours" classid="{C6D124CA-7EDA-4a60-AEA9-7FB8D318B68F}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111122}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Priority" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_priority" datafieldname="cdxmeta_priority" classid="{C6D124CA-7EDA-4a60-AEA9-7FB8D318B68F}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="status" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111123}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Status" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111124}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Stage" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_stage" datafieldname="cdxmeta_stage" classid="{3EF39988-22BB-4F0B-BBBE-64B5A3748AEE}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111125}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Blocked" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_isblocked" datafieldname="cdxmeta_isblocked" classid="{67FAC785-CD58-4f9f-ABB3-4B7DDC6ED5ED}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
          </columns>
        </tab>
        <tab name="related" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111126}" IsUserDefined="1" expanded="true" showlabel="true">
          <labels>
            <label description="Related" languagecode="1033" />
          </labels>
          <columns>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="category_snapshot" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111127}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Category Snapshot" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111128}" showlabel="false">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Category Snapshot" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_category_snapshot" classid="{5C5600E0-1D6E-4205-A272-BE80DA87FD42}" datafieldname="cdxmeta_categoryid">
                          <parameters>
                            <QuickForms><QuickFormIds><QuickFormId entityname="cdxmeta_category">5978624f-3b37-f111-88b3-0022489b9600</QuickFormId></QuickFormIds></QuickForms>
                            <ControlMode>Edit</ControlMode>
                          </parameters>
                        </control>
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
            <column width="50%">
              <sections>
                <section name="checkpoints" id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111129}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="true" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="Checkpoints" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111130}" showlabel="false" rowspan="8">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Checkpoints" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_checkpoints" classid="{E7A81278-8635-4d9e-8D4D-59480B391C5B}" indicationOfSubgrid="true">
                          <parameters>
                            <ViewId>{500a740d-e399-42c5-9f3a-0f9c203ef9cd}</ViewId>
                            <IsUserView>false</IsUserView>
                            <RelationshipName>cdxmeta_workitem_checkpoint</RelationshipName>
                            <TargetEntityType>cdxmeta_checkpoint</TargetEntityType>
                            <AutoExpand>Auto</AutoExpand>
                            <EnableQuickFind>false</EnableQuickFind>
                            <EnableViewPicker>false</EnableViewPicker>
                            <ViewIds>{500a740d-e399-42c5-9f3a-0f9c203ef9cd}</ViewIds>
                            <EnableJumpBar>false</EnableJumpBar>
                            <ChartGridMode>Grid</ChartGridMode>
                            <EnableChartPicker>false</EnableChartPicker>
                            <RecordsPerPage>5</RecordsPerPage>
                          </parameters>
                        </control>
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                    <row />
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
          </columns>
        </tab>
      </tabs>
      <header id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111131}" columns="111" celllabelposition="Top" labelwidth="115">
        <rows>
          <row>
            <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111132}" showlabel="true">
              <labels>
                <label description="Stage" languagecode="1033" />
              </labels>
              <control id="header_cdxmeta_stage" datafieldname="cdxmeta_stage" classid="{3EF39988-22BB-4F0B-BBBE-64B5A3748AEE}" />
            </cell>
            <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111133}" showlabel="true">
              <labels>
                <label description="Due date" languagecode="1033" />
              </labels>
              <control id="header_cdxmeta_duedate" datafieldname="cdxmeta_duedate" classid="{5B773807-9FB2-42db-97C3-7A91EFF8ADFF}" />
            </cell>
            <cell id="{11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111134}" showlabel="true">
              <labels>
                <label description="Category" languagecode="1033" />
              </labels>
              <control id="header_cdxmeta_categoryid" datafieldname="cdxmeta_categoryid" classid="{270BD3DB-D9AF-4782-9025-509E298DEC0A}" />
            </cell>
          </row>
        </rows>
      </header>
    </form>
